name: 调整部分数值与机制的模组

description:
Many parts have been modified(including character attributes, relic attribute effects, some card attribute effects, and power effects). 
进行了很多部分的修改（包括角色属性、遗物属性效果、部分卡牌属性效果、Buff效果），且对本地化有部分修改。
